info.title: SmartRecruiters
info.description: Dual-mode SmartRecruiters connector with an MCP endpoint for Copilot Studio and typed REST operations for Power Automate. Covers the Customer API (Jobs, Candidates, Job Applications, Users, Configuration, Approvals, Reviews, Messages, Interviews, Self-Scheduling, Interview Templates, Reporting, Webhooks, Audit), the public Posting API, and the Application API.

post.description: Model Context Protocol streamable endpoint for Copilot Studio integration with SmartRecruiters.
Create a new candidate application for a public job posting. Operates on behalf of the candidate.

get.description: Returns application configuration (screening questions, privacy policies, settings) for a posting.
Get the current status of a previously submitted application.
Public Posting API — list active postings published by a company. No authentication required.
Public Posting API — get a single posting by id or uuid.
Public Posting API — list departments for a company.
Search jobs by parameters. Supports pagination via limit/offset.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Job status filter (DRAFT, SOURCING, INTERVIEW, OFFER, HIRED, ON_HOLD, CANCELLED, FILLED).

post.description: Create a new job. Ignores nonexistent job properties / values.

put.description: Full update of a job and its jobAd. Replaces all job ad properties.

patch.description: Partial update of a job using JSON Merge Patch (RFC 7396). Use operations like add/remove on /properties/-, /compensation, etc.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Array of JSON Merge Patch operations.

put.description: Update job status (e.g. SOURCING, ON_HOLD, FILLED, CANCELLED).

ListResult.description: Paginated list wrapper used by most SmartRecruiters list endpoints.

limit.description: Maximum number of items returned in this page.

offset.description: Zero-based offset of the first item in this page.

totalFound.description: Total number of items matching the query across all pages.

nextPage.description: Opaque cursor (Reporting API) for the next page; empty if this is the last page.

content.description: Items in this page. Item shape varies per endpoint.

regionCode.description: ISO 3166-2 region code (uppercase). Required for US.

Web.description: Social and personal web links for a candidate.

current.description: True if the candidate is currently enrolled.
True if this is the candidate's current position.

SourceDetails.description: Tracks how a candidate or application originated.

AnswerRecord.description: Single answer record for a repeatable screening question.

fields.description: Map of fieldId to array of answer values.

ScreeningQuestionAnswer.description: Candidate-supplied answer to a screening question.

FieldValue.description: Allowed value for a screening question field.

type.description: Input control (INPUT_TEXT, SINGLE_SELECT, MULTI_SELECT, RADIO, CHECKBOX, TEXTAREA, INFORMATION).

values.description: Allowed values when type is select/radio/checkbox.

ScreeningQuestion.description: Screening question shown to a candidate.

repeatable.description: Whether the question may have multiple answer records.

aiGenerated.description: Whether the question was generated by AI.

ConditionalScreeningQuestion.description: Conditional question shown only when parent answer matches.

fieldId.description: Field id within the parent question.

valueIds.description: Parent values that trigger this question.

avatarUploadAvailable.description: Whether candidates can upload an avatar.

ConsentScopeDetails.description: Consent scope shown to the candidate.

scope.description: Scope identifier (SINGLE, SMART_RECRUIT, SMART_CRM, SMART_MESSAGE_SMS, SMART_MESSAGE_WHATSAPP).

required.description: Whether consent is required for this scope.

ConsentSettings.description: Consent configuration for the apply flow.

noPolicyDescription.description: Text shown when no privacy policy is configured.

scopes.description: Consent scopes shown to the candidate.

aiDisclosureLabel.description: Disclosure text shown to the candidate.

ApplyConfiguration.description: Configuration returned for a public posting (questions, policies, settings).

questions.description: Screening questions shown to the candidate.

privacyPolicies.description: Privacy policies the candidate must view.

ApplyApiRequest.description: Application submitted on behalf of a candidate.

tags.description: Tags to apply to the candidate.

consentDecisions.description: Map of scope id to boolean consent decision.

conditionalsIncluded.description: Include conditional answers in this submission.

ApplyApiResponse.description: Response after submitting a candidate application.

applicationId.description: Application id (one candidate may have many).

ApplicationStatusInfo.description: Application status from the candidate's perspective.

status.description: NEW, IN_REVIEW, INTERVIEW, OFFERED, HIRED, ARCHIVED.

substatus.description: Sub-status when ARCHIVED (REJECTED, WITHDRAWN_BY_APPLICANT, TRANSFERRED, DELETED_BY_COMPANY).

IdLabel.description: Generic id/label pair used for lookup fields (industry, function, type-of-employment, experience-level, status, etc.).

JobProperty.description: Property/value pair attached to a job.

value.description: Property value (shape depends on property type).

defaultJobAd.description: Whether this is the default job ad.

releasedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the posting went live.

customField.description: Custom field values on the posting.

status.description: DRAFT, SOURCING, INTERVIEW, OFFER, HIRED, ON_HOLD, CANCELLED, FILLED.

jobAd.description: Default job ad (see Job Ad endpoints for shape).

JobCreateRequest.description: Body for creating a new job.

JobUpdateRequest.description: Body for a full job update (PUT). Replaces all jobAd properties.

JobPatchOperation.description: JSON Merge Patch operation per RFC 7396.

status.description: New status (DRAFT, SOURCING, ON_HOLD, INTERVIEW, OFFER, HIRED, CANCELLED, FILLED).

JobStatusHistoryEntry.description: Single entry in a job status history.

JobNote.description: Hiring team note attached to a job.

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the note.

HiringTeamMember.description: Member of a job's hiring team.

HiringTeamAddRequest.description: Body for adding a hiring team member.

sections.description: Job ad sections (companyDescription, jobDescription, qualifications, additionalInformation).

JobAdRequest.description: Body for creating or updating a job ad.

sections.description: Job ad sections (companyDescription, jobDescription, qualifications, additionalInformation).

JobAdPostingPublishRequest.description: Body for publishing a job ad to internal sources and aggregators.

publishToInternalSources.description: Publish to career sites, widgets, posting API, etc.

JobPositionRequest.description: Body for creating or updating a job position.

JobApproval.description: Approval request attached to a job.

CandidateUpdateRequest.description: Body for patching candidate personal info.

CandidateApplication.description: Candidate's application to a specific job.

status.description: NEW, IN_REVIEW, INTERVIEW, OFFERED, HIRED, REJECTED, WITHDRAWN_BY_APPLICANT.

ApplicationStatusUpdate.description: Body for updating an application's status.

status.description: NEW, IN_REVIEW, INTERVIEW, OFFERED, HIRED, REJECTED, WITHDRAWN_BY_APPLICANT.

reasonId.description: Rejection or withdrawal reason id (required when archiving).

CandidatePropertyValue.description: Single candidate property value (shape depends on property type).

value.description: Value object (string, boolean, object with code/value, etc.).

OnboardingStatusInfo.description: Onboarding status for a candidate's application.

ScreeningAnswersResponse.description: Screening question answers for an application.

ResumeParseRequest.description: Body for resume parsing and candidate creation.

JobApplication.description: Job application resource (referenced by application id).

UserCreateRequest.description: Body for creating a user. Created users are inactive until activated.

AccessGroupAssignRequest.description: Body for assigning users to an access group.

userIds.description: User ids to add to the access group.

PredefinedLocationRequest.description: Body for creating a predefined location.

JobPropertyRequest.description: Body for creating or updating a job property.

visible.description: Whether the property is visible to users.

type.description: Property type (TEXT, NUMBER, BOOLEAN, SINGLE_SELECT, MULTI_SELECT, DATE, etc.).

JobPropertyValueRequest.description: Body for creating a job property value.

ApprovalCreateRequest.description: Body for creating an approval request based on an existing one.

baseId.description: Existing approval request id to base on.

ApprovalActionRequest.description: Body for approving or rejecting an approval request.

ApprovalCommentRequest.description: Body for adding an approval comment.

hiringTeamOf.description: Job ids whose hiring team should receive the note.

everyone.description: Share with everyone in the company.

openNote.description: Share with everyone with access to the candidate.

NoteCreateRequest.description: Body for sharing a Hireloop note. Use @[USER:id] to mention users, #[CANDIDATE:id] to tag candidates.

candidateId.description: Candidate id the note is attached to.

MessageTemplateRequest.description: Body for creating or updating a message template.

InterviewRequest.description: Body for creating or updating an interview.

TimeslotRequest.description: Body for creating or updating a timeslot.

AutomatedSelfScheduleRequest.description: Body for creating an automated self-schedule.

durationMinutes.description: Duration of each slot in minutes.

InterviewTemplateRequest.description: Body for creating or updating an interview template.

ReviewRequest.description: Body for creating or updating a review.

ReportFileList.description: List of report files with cursor pagination.

nextPage.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; empty if last page.

AdHocReportRequest.description: Body for triggering an ad-hoc report generation.

CallbackAuth.description: Authentication scheme used when SmartRecruiters posts to the callbackUrl.

alertingEmail.description: Email to notify on delivery failures.

SubscriptionCreateRequest.description: Body for creating a webhook subscription. Must be activated before events flow.

alertingEmail.description: Email to notify on delivery failures.

SubscriptionSecretKey.description: Secret key for verifying webhook callbacks.

expiresOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp; superseded keys are valid for 24 hours.

statusCode.description: HTTP status returned by the callback URL.

authorId.description: User id that triggered the event (may be null for system events).

context.description: Event-specific additional context (see SmartRecruiters Audit API docs for shape per event).

Event.description: Recruitment event (e.g. career fair, hiring day).

EventRequest.description: Body for creating or updating an event.

applicantIds.description: Applicant candidate ids assigned to this session.

EventApplicant.description: Applicant within an event pool or session.

applicationId.description: Application id (if applied to one of the event's jobs).

sessionId.description: Session id (null if still in event applicants pool).

AddApplicantsRequest.description: Body for adding applicants to an event pool or session.

MoveApplicantsRequest.description: Body for moving applicants between sessions.

AddInterviewersRequest.description: Body for adding interviewers to a session.

InterviewStatusUpdate.description: Body for updating a candidate's status on an interview.

InterviewerStatusUpdate.description: Body for updating an interviewer's status on a timeslot.

TimeslotNoShowUpdate.description: Body for flagging or clearing no-show on a timeslot.

noShow.description: True to mark no-show, false to clear.

SelfScheduleInterviewRequest.description: Body for creating or updating a self-scheduled interview entry.

SelfRescheduleRequest.description: Body for requesting an automated self-reschedule for an application.

SelfScheduleInviteUpdate.description: Body for updating an automated self-schedule invite.

SchedulePreferences.description: Interview scheduling preferences for a user.

workingHours.description: Working hours per weekday (key = weekday, value = { start, end }).

interviewerIds.description: Interviewer user ids assigned at the job level.

JobInterviewTemplateRequest.description: Body for creating or updating a job-level interview template assignment.

JobInterviewTemplateInterviewersUpdate.description: Body for patching interviewers on a job-level interview template.

ManagedStep.description: Hiring stage / step requiring an interview template.

templateRequired.description: Whether an interview template is required for this step.

ManagedStepsUpdate.description: Body for updating managed steps for a job's hiring process.

TemplateAssignmentSearchRequest.description: Body for finding job-level templates by multiple application ids.

Offer.description: Offer attached to a candidate / application.

status.description: Offer status (DRAFT, PENDING_APPROVAL, APPROVED, SENT, ACCEPTED, DECLINED, REVOKED, EXPIRED).

OfferDocument.description: Document attached to a sent offer.

ScorecardCriterion.description: Configured scorecard criterion for a job.

NotificationPreference.description: Notification preference entry for a hiring role + channel pair.

EmployeePreferencesRequest.description: Body for saving / updating notification preferences for an employee.

GlobalPreferencesRequest.description: Body for upserting global notification preferences.

BulkPreferencesUpdate.description: Body for bulk activating / deactivating notification preferences across roles and channels.

NotificationType.description: Catalog entry describing a notification type and its applicable roles / channels.

applicableRoles.description: Roles that can receive this notification.

channels.description: Channels that can deliver this notification.

ShortenUrlRequest.description: Body for shortening a smartrecruiters.com URL.

url.description: Long URL to shorten (must be on smartrecruiters.com domain).

OnboardingProcess.description: SmartOnboard onboarding process for a new hire.

OnboardingAssignment.description: Activity assignment within an onboarding process.

FormAnswers.description: Collection of form answers for an assignment.

WebFormFieldMetadata.description: Metadata describing a single field of a web form assignment.

type.description: Field type (TEXT, NUMBER, BOOLEAN, DATE, SELECT, etc.).

oauth_partner.description: SmartRecruiters General Partner Integration (OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials grant). The connector exchanges the configured Client ID and Client Secret for a Bearer token at runtime; you do not need to fetch a token manually.
